summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that WEC is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $113.11. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 9.1%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. Currently, there are no major overhead resistance clusters detected within the immediate upside range. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
